title: Infrastructure Fingerprint Workflow
when_to_use: Before active testing to profile the target stack

steps.title: Initial Setup/Scanning
steps.instruction: Run WhatWeb in verbose mode to identify web technologies and versions
steps.tip: Start with the most reliable information source for infrastructure fingerprint workflow
steps.expected_output: Detailed list of web frameworks, CMS versions, JavaScript libraries, and analytics platforms

steps.title: Data Collection/Configuration
steps.instruction: Run wafw00f to detect Web Application Firewall presence and type
steps.tip: Organize data systematically to avoid duplicates and ensure coverage
steps.expected_output: WAF detection results confirming presence/absence and WAF product name if detected

steps.title: Analysis/Enumeration
steps.instruction: Analyse HTTP response headers using curl to identify server software and configurations
steps.tip: Look for patterns and correlations in collected data
steps.expected_output: HTTP headers showing server type, frameworks, security headers, and custom configurations

steps.title: Advanced Technique/Filtering
steps.instruction: Check robots.txt and sitemap.xml for directory enumeration hints
steps.tip: Use multiple techniques to increase coverage and accuracy
steps.expected_output: Enumeration of intended and unintended accessible directories and resources

steps.title: Correlation/Testing
steps.instruction: Run Wappalyzer browser extension to identify technologies from web interface
steps.tip: Validate findings across different tools and methods
steps.expected_output: Browser-based technology detection confirming server-side findings

steps.title: Validation/Exploitation
steps.instruction: Perform DNS mapping using dig ANY to identify DNS records and email servers
steps.expected_output: Complete DNS records including A, MX, TXT, CNAME records and DMARC/SPF policies

steps.title: Documentation/Reporting
steps.instruction: Compile all findings into a technology profile document
steps.tip: Review all findings before compilation for accuracy and completeness
steps.expected_output: Structured technology profile document detailing the complete technology stack
